channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Litter, 2nd March
item.description:
Would it be possible to spend more time picking up litter here, please? The team do a good job, but there is visible litter in the bushes and around the benches. Thank you to the team though for what they do.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albemarle Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter bin full again, 2nd March
item.description:
Litter bin once again full. Would it be possible to empty this bin more frequently, please? It is very quickly filled up
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Church Avenue, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Countdown not working, 2nd March
item.description:
Reported twice previously and still not fixed.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 49, Beckenham Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on the comms box, 2nd March
item.description:
Near 16a Hayne Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hayne Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: In road outside 21/25, 2nd March
item.description:
The man hole cover rocks when cars travel over it. It is very loud and disturbing. Been this way for over a month.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 23, Agar Grove, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: ALL Stop lines faded, 2nd March
item.description:
Stop line faded on A,B, C, D,E, F phase- required repainting
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Jute Lane, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted Broken Tolley-Bag Dumped on Pavement, 2nd March
item.description:
An unwanted and broken trolley-bag has been dumped on the pavement outside number 31. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Waverley Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags of Rubbish and Unwanted Toy Dumped on Pavement, 2nd March
item.description:
Several bags of rubbish and an unwanted toy have been left dumped on the pavement. Can the local team please remove them. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ann Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken Furniture Dumped in Raised Planter, 2nd March
item.description:
Items of broken furniture have been left dumped in the raised planter. Can the local team please remove them. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Walmer Terrace, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large Item of Unwanted Furniture Dumped on Path, 2nd March
item.description:
A large item of unwanted furniture has been left dumped on the path. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Maxey Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rocking and noisy manhole cover, 2nd March
item.description:
I have reported that before. The noise is louder now. The manhole cover is rocking on the Road. It is very noisy especially at night
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Baring Street, Islington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned bin, 2nd March
item.description:
Abandoned bin that does not belong to any of the houses on this street.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Warner Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Items of Domestic Rubbish on Path, 2nd March
item.description:
Several items of domestic rubbish have been left dumped on the path. Can the local team please remove them. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Maxey Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted Mattress and Pallet Dumped on Raised Planter, 2nd March
item.description:
An unwanted mattress and a large unwanted pallet have been left dumped in the raised planter. Can the local team please remove them. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Robert Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light not working, 2nd March
item.description:
Windsor close Chislehurst street light not working
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 50, Westhurst Drive, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog poo on 1 Glebe Road, 2nd March
item.description:
Another day another dog poo in front of 1 Glebe Road. Please let me know what can be done about this besides reporting every time

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingsland Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Water leak in the Glades, 2nd March
item.description:
There are two holes in the ground that are spouting water in The Glades, flooding the grass. The leaks are on the right hand side of the pathway entering from Halfway Street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 21, Halfway Street, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large Unwanted Mattress Dumped on Path, 2nd March
item.description:
A large unwanted mattress has been left dumped on the path. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glyndon Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole on the mini roundabout, 2nd March
item.description:
This pothole has been there for several weeks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 58, Queensway, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted Furniture Dumped on Turfed Area, 2nd March
item.description:
An item of unwanted furniture has been left dumped on the turfed area. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glyndon Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet
